creator: nccs@vfemail.net
text:
I have a asus g750jx i7-4700hq 16GB mem 1tb HD  gtx770 video
When I boot from EFI (only) I get the following Panic!!!!

panic: vm_fault: fault no nofault entry,  addr:   fffffe0000eb8000
cpuid=0
KDB stack backtrace:
#0  0xffffffff806db2f0 at +0x149900
#1  0xffffffff806a0415 at +0x10ea25
#2  0xffffffff809138be at +0x381ece
#3  0xffffffff80911d07 at +0x380317
#4  0xffffffff8095785c at +0x3c5e6c
#5  0xffffffff8095702a at +0x3c563a
#6  0xffffffff8093cf12 at +0x3ab522
#7  0xffffffff802b298c at ??+0


yet if I boot from my usb install release(10)
(esc)
and set currdev to disk1p10
unload
load kernel
boot 


And alls fine the system boots

The system boot fine from EFI before I updated to RC4
from 10.1 prerelease

make buildworld
make buildkernel
make installworld
make installkernel
all went well not problems
